note: Synthetic per-session fixture for key_correctness_eval.py. Every entity/value below (company, city, tool, food, name) is a FICTIONAL placeholder — no real user data. 'lifecycles' group sessions that describe the SAME slot updating over time (an ADD then a SUPERSEDE); extraction_goldset_v1.json's 'labels' annotate each session by its 'sid'. v1 adds high-risk update lifecycles (medication/emergency-contact/legal-name/primary-physician/dietary-restriction — sids prefixed accordingly, e.g. 'med-s1') alongside more benign lifecycles, on top of the v0 set kept verbatim below.
